prompt: Make the sun looks like its undergoing a extreme once in every 100 years superflare eruption
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the provided image of the Sun, to depict an extreme, once-in-a-century superflare eruption. The superflare should appear as a prominent, massive, and brilliant expulsion of plasma and intense energy radiating from the solar surface.
objects: Intense energy radiating from the superflare
